nasb.text: God also testifying with them, both by signs and wonders and by various miracles and by gifts of the Holy Spirit according to His own will.

esv.text: while God also bore witness by signs and wonders and various miracles and by gifts of the Holy Spirit distributed according to his will.

cnv.text: 神又照著自己的旨意，用神蹟、奇事和各樣異能，以及聖靈的恩賜，與他們一同作見證。

ccb.text: 同时，上帝按自己的旨意，用神迹、奇事、各样的异能、圣灵的恩赐和他们一同做见证。

csbs.text: 神又照着自己的旨意，用神迹、奇事和各种大能，以及圣灵的各种恩赐，与他们一同见证。
